revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23984597483|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[ja:鉢伏山西峰古墳]] {{Infobox ancient site|type = {{ill|Square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|zh|方墳|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} |name= Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun |image=[[File:Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun, entrance.jpg|280px]]
Front view of Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber |location= Komagatani, Habikino City, Osaka Prefecture |coordinates= |area= 20m per side |built= 7th century |Burial Facility= Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber |Interred Persons= |burial goods= Sue pottery, bricks |Historic Site Designation= |Special Notes= }} '''Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun''' (鉢伏山西峰古墳) is a {{ill|terminal Kofun period|ja|終末期古墳|1=Late Kofun tumuli|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/terminal Kofun period|13=User:Immanuelle/Late Kofun tumuli|qq=}} {{ill|square Kofun|ja|方墳|1=Square Kofun|1=Square Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/square Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Square Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} located in {{ill|Habikino|en|Habikino|qid=Q694308|lt=Habikino, Osaka|1=Habikino}}, Komagatani, Osaka Prefecture. Excavations revealed a meticulously constructed cut-stone {{ill|horizontal stone chamber|ja|横口式石槨|1=Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/horizontal stone chamber|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}}. == Overview == Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun is located on the ridge of a hill extending from the 221m peak of Hachibuseyama, at an elevation of 135m (with a 100m height difference from the surrounding plain). Excavations began in 1994 under the supervision of the Habikino City Board of Education. Before the excavation, the {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} had already been partially exposed, with some stone materials missing. The Kofun was previously assumed to be a {{ill|round Kofun|ja|円墳|1=Round Kofun|1=Round Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/round Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Round Kofun|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} approximately 20m in diameter. === Mound type and area === The Kofun is trapezoidal, with its eastern side measuring about 12m and its western side 20m. The mound is shaped from quartz andesite bedrock and topped with fill soil. A trench dug into the bedrock separates the mound from the ridge behind it. The front of the mound features a terraced flat area created by shaping the natural terrain and apping fill. The mound's outer surface appears to lack stone coverings or protective stones. === Horizontal Stone Chamber === [[File:Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun, 3D-P.jpg|thumb|300px|right|{{center|Perspective drawing of the stone chamber}}]] [[File:Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun, 3D-N.jpg|thumb|250px|right|{{center|Exploded view of the stone chamber}}]] The {{ill|Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|ja|横口式石槨|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Side-entrance Sarcophagus Chamber|qq=}} opens westward and includes a front chamber and passage attached to the main chamber. The primary material is cut quartz andesite, crafted with precision. The main chamber, where the coffin was placed, measures approximately 2.7m in length, 0.8m in width, and 0.7m in height. The chamber was carved directly into the bedrock, with walls and flooring typeed from the exposed quartz andesite. A separate single stone serves as the ceiling. Traces of plaster remain inside, suggesting an intention to seal and waterproof the chamber. The front chamber, partially damaged, originally measured 2.4m in length and 1.2m in width. The floor was paved with tuff stones likely sourced from {{ill|Mount Nijō|en|Mount Nijō|qid=Q11371271|lt=Mount Nijō|1=Mount Nijō}}. These stones were block-shaped but varied in size, with sides measuring 30–50cm and a thickness of approximately 15cm. A rectangular stone block, raised above the floor level, marks the entrance to the front chamber. The passage walls are in poor condition, with only one stone remaining in its original position. The passage width is estimated at 1.2m. A drainage system comprising split quartz andesite stones filled with small gravel and covered with flat stones was found along the passage floor. Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun, 3D-B.jpg|Overhead view of the stone chamber Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun, sekkaku.jpg|Interior of the stone chamber Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun, zenshitsu.jpg|Front chamber === burial goods and built === As the chamber had already been opened, few coffin fittings or grave goods were found. The associated burial goods include {{ill|Haji pottery|en|Haji pottery|qid=Q5639938|lt=Haji pottery|1=Haji pottery}}, {{ill|Sue pottery|en|Sue pottery|qid=Q7634351|lt=Sue pottery|1=Sue pottery}}, and bricks. The characteristics of the Sue pottery place it within the Asuka II phase of the {{ill|Asuka-Fujiwara chronology|ja|飛鳥藤原編年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Asuka-Fujiwara chronology|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, dating to the mid-7th century. This period is also considered the likely construction date of the Kofun. == References == * Itō, Kiyohiro. "Excavation Findings of Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun," in *Kawachi Asuka and Terminal built Kofun*, ed. Habikino City Board of Education, Yoshikawa Kōbunkan, 1998, pp. 139–150. == Related Articles == * {{ill|Kannonzuka Kofun|en|Kannonzuka Kofun|qid=Q11630595|lt=Kannonzuka Kofun|1=Kannonzuka Kofun}} * {{ill|Ōko No. 8 Kofun|ja|オーコ8号墳|1=Ōko No. 8 Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōko No. 8 Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōko No. 8 Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Oguchiyama Kofun|ja|小口山古墳|1=Koguchiyama Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oguchiyama Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Koguchiyama Kofun|qq=}} * {{ill|Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|ja|大佐山白塚古墳|1=Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Osayama Shiratsuka Kofun|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōsayama Shiratsuka Kofun|qq=}} == External Links == {{Commonscat|Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun}} * [http://www.city.habikino.lg.jp/10kakuka/34shakaikyoiku/03bunkazai/04isekishokai/06shumatuki/t_s_hachibuse.html Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun] (Site introduction by Habikino City Hall) {{Kofun navbar}} {{translated page|ja|鉢伏山西峰古墳|version=103376869|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:鉢伏山西峰古墳]] {{Commons category|Hachibuseyama Nishimine Kofun}} {{wikidata link|Q11649845}} [[Category:History of Habikino, Osaka]] [[Category:Kofun of Osaka prefecture]] [[Category:Pages using infobox ancient site with unknown parameters]] [[Category:Square Kofun]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
